_doc: Committed >=90 council rating for #3826 (Epic #3822 C2, Gap B -- plan-rating promotion gate). The Epic does not mark its own homework: the design+diff were rated by a cross-family council of genuinely DISJOINT non-Anthropic families, web-grounded, against #3826's ACs, via the free-fleet-first ($0) substrate. Disagreement-aware (a lone model's 92 is not a gate; three disjoint families converged). The verified kind:review receipt independently confirms >=2 distinct non-authoring PASS.
gate: >=90 goal-lens council, >=3 genuinely disjoint non-Anthropic families, chance-corrected (D4 Gwet AC1 >= 0.6)

verified_receipt.note: The un-forgeable independence proof: >=2 distinct non-authoring (non-anthropic) families PASS over the hash-chained committed ledger. Disjoint from the numeric design council below (which adds fleet-qwen as a third family).

web_grounding: Human-in-the-loop escalation 2026 (reversibility-tiered oversight): reversible/normal work runs uninterrupted; only genuine plan->impl promotion needs the gate -- the gate must not over-block.
Approval fatigue is an agent security bug (ATR-2026-00118): a gate that fires on non-carve-out work trains click-through; the plan-rating gate fires ONLY on the Phase-0->Phase-1 promotion boundary.

An in-context instruction cannot self-police: the bypass-resistant control is a hash-chained cross-family receipt independent of the authoring model (cross-family-receipt.verifyReceipt), not operator free-text.
PoLL (Verga et al. 2024): a diverse jury of small models beats one large judge at >7x lower cost -- hence >=3 disjoint families, not one big rater.

Judge-reliability 2026 (Norman et al.; Yang et al.): raw agreement overstates validity by 33-41 pts and same-vendor raters carry self-preference; use chance-corrected Gwet AC1 (NOT Cohen/Fleiss kappa, which paradox-collapses on high-agreement panels).

per_family.why: AC3 corpus replay blocks invalid/forged/single-family/below-90 and promotes valid; enforced at the decision point, not advisory.
verifyReceipt + the planRating.ok conjunct structurally enforce AC1/AC3 without over-blocking; reversible work passes silently.
phase0GreenComplete correctly extended with the conjunct + helper; structural verifyReceipt then semantic committed-score read is offline-deterministic.

rounds.gwet_note: Unanimous PASS across 3 genuinely disjoint families (meta/mistral/qwen) -> chance-corrected Gwet AC1 = 1.0, well above the 0.6 D4 floor. Kappa would paradox-collapse here; Gwet does not. gemini (google) returned empty_response -- an availability miss, NOT a dissent, so it is not counted as a rater.
rounds.disagreement_note: No dissent to fold: three disjoint vendors independently cleared >=90 with tight scores (92/94/92). Convergence is meaningful because the families are genuinely disjoint (not correlated same-family raters), so this is not the popularity trap.
